scope_comment: Mutation testing for the chart kit's pure logic (charts.md section 12 /
coloring (categoryColor), and the income/spend series rule
(seriesColors). The React/SVG primitives (*.tsx) and the Animated
entrance hook are deliberately NOT mutated: they are RN render code,
covered by typecheck plus the integration/e2e layers of the test plan.
runner_comment: This harness tests with node:test (npm test = tsc + node --test), so we
use the tap runner exactly like packages/shared: it executes each
compiled test file with `node` and parses the TAP stream node:test
emits. buildCommand compiles the instrumented sandbox once (mutant
switching does the rest); see tsconfig.stryker.json for why that build
sandbox_comment: tsconfig.test.json is excluded from the sandbox on purpose: it extends
triggers Stryker's tsconfig preprocessor, which dynamically imports
'typescript' from the npx install tree where it is not present. The
sandbox build only ever uses the self-contained tsconfig.stryker.json.
